app.name: Cross Charge
app.description: Provides workflow actions for identifying DPS cost per entity/tag

scopes.name: app-engine:functions:run
scopes.comment: Run functions in the analytics workflow

scopes.name: automation:workflows:read
scopes.comment: Needed to read the Workflows to find ingested workflow

scopes.name: storage:entities:read
scopes.comment: allows to query entities from Grail

scopes.name: storage:events:write
scopes.comment: Allows for local ingestion of bizevents

scopes.name: storage:buckets:read
scopes.comment: Allows the user to query records from Grail buckets

scopes.name: storage:bizevents:read
scopes.comment: Allows the user to query records from the bizevents table

actions.name: get-rate-card
actions.title: GetRateCard
actions.description: Gathers rate card data via Dynatrace accounts API. Requires Configuration.

actions.name: get-metric-bucket-usage
actions.title: GetMetricBucketUsage
actions.description: Gathers % of included host metrics that were billed.

actions.name: get-generic-entity-types
actions.title: GetGenericEntityTypes
actions.description: Gathers generic topology types in this environment.

actions.name: get-entities
actions.title: GetEntities
actions.description: Gathers all the entity IDs of a specific entity type.

actions.name: get-entity-information
actions.title: GetEntityInformation
actions.description: Gathers entity name and tags for specified entity ID.

actions.name: get-billing-usage
actions.title: GetBillingUsage
actions.description: Gathers DPS billing usage for specific entity and creates bizevent.

actions.name: send-bizevent
actions.title: SendBizevent
actions.description: Sends bizevent to configured Dynatrace tenant. Requires Configuration.

Cross-Charge-Reporting.name: Cross Charge Reporting
Cross-Charge-Reporting.description: Provides overview of Cross Charge data
